key_insight: OISD improves reasoning by distilling the final layer’s on-policy signals into intermediate layers during RL post-training, so the model learns both better outputs and better internal representations.
engineering_relevance: For large language model training pipelines, OISD offers a plug-in alignment mechanism that can boost reasoning performance without external teacher models or privileged annotations.
method: Use the final layer as both the acting policy and a detached internal teacher.
Align selected intermediate layers with the final layer using logit alignment to transfer reasoning behavior.
Add attention alignment and signed advantage-weighted Jensen–Shannon alignment to preserve policy consistency while distilling useful internal signals.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports substantial and consistent gains over strong reasoning RL baselines across four mathematical reasoning tasks.
watch_item: Because the method adds intermediate-layer alignment terms during RL optimization, it may increase training complexity and require careful tuning to avoid destabilizing policy learning.
paper_title: OISD: On-Policy Internal Self-Distillation of Language Models
